$comment: D-FC12C-AAPCS64-HFA-STRUCT-VARARG: AAPCS64 (ARM64-ELF) STRUCT varargs across every Aapcs64Hfa class on BOTH the register arm AND the __stack overflow arm. sumHfa({double,double})=8 (VR register gather, H1+H2) + sumGpr({long,long})=30 (GR register gather) + sumByRef({long,long,long} 24B)=6 (hidden-pointer deref, H5/H7) + sumAfterDrain(7 longs drain GR, then {long,long} on __stack)=73 (caller H8 + non-HFA overflow read) + sumHfaOverflow(8 doubles drain VR, then {double,double} HFA on __stack)=18 (FOLD 2 / H6 HFA overflow arm, roundUp(16,8) bump). 8+30+6+73+18 = 135. RED-ON-DISABLE: a dropped piece, wrong-class save block (H2), missing sign-extend (H1), dropped ByRef deref (H5), missing caller exhaustion check (H8), or wrong overflow stride (H6) flips the exit off 135. arm64-ELF under qemu-aarch64.
